languages.text: "Примитивная юная цивилизация, активно осваивающая регион последние столетия. Ее представители редко добиваться чего-то значимого, и все же даже такие малопримечательные создания порой могут оставить след в истории".

traits.locale_text: "Примитивная юная цивилизация, активно осваивающая регион последние столетия. Малопримечательна, и все же я сохранил кое-что для полноты исторической картины — даже столь ничтожная раса оставляет след".

languages.text: "A young and primitive civilisation, diligently exploring the region for the past several centuries. Rarely do they achieve anything of substance, and yet even such unremarkable creatures can at times leave a mark on history."
languages.original_text: "Примитивная юная цивилизация, активно осваивающая регион последние столетия. Ее представители редко добиваться чего-то значимого, и все же даже такие малопримечательные создания порой могут оставить след в истории".

traits.locale_text: "A primitive, young civilisation, intently exploring the region for the past centuries. Rarely do they achieve anything of substance, and yet even such unremarkable creatures can at times leave a mark on history."

"A young and primitive civilisation, diligently exploring the region for the past several centuries. Rarely do they achieve anything of substance, and yet even such unremarkable creatures can at times leave a mark on history."

"A primitive, young civilisation, intently exploring the region for the past centuries. Hardly noteworthy, and yet I have preserved something of it to provide a complete historical picture — even so insignificant a race leaves a mark."

"A primitive, young civilisation, intently exploring the region for the past centuries. Rarely do they achieve anything of substance, and yet even such unremarkable creatures can at times leave a mark on history."

"A young and primitive civilisation, diligently exploring the region for the past several centuries. Rarely do they achieve anything of substance, and yet even such unremarkable creatures can at times leave a mark on history."

languages.text: “一个原始而年轻的文明，过去几个世纪以来一直在执着地探索这片区域。他们很少取得实质性成果，但即便是如此不起眼的生物，有时候也能在历史上留下印记。”
languages.original_text: "A young and primitive civilisation, diligently exploring the region for the past several centuries. Rarely do they achieve anything of substance, and yet even such unremarkable creatures can at times leave a mark on history."

traits.locale_text: “一个原始而年轻的文明，过去几个世纪以来一直在执着地探索这片区域。他们很少取得实质性成果，但即便是如此不起眼的生物，有时候也能在历史上留下印记。”

languages.text: «Una civilización joven y primitiva que explora con entusiasmo la región desde hace siglos. No suelen conseguir nada digno de mención, pero incluso unas criaturas tan notables terminan dejando huella en la historia ocasionalmente».
languages.original_text: "A young and primitive civilisation, diligently exploring the region for the past several centuries. Rarely do they achieve anything of substance, and yet even such unremarkable creatures can at times leave a mark on history."

traits.locale_text: «Una civilización joven y primitiva que explora con entusiasmo la región desde hace siglos. No suelen conseguir nada digno de mención, pero incluso unas criaturas tan notables terminan dejando huella en la historia ocasionalmente».

languages.text: « Une jeune civilisation primitive, partie à la découverte de cette région au cours des derniers siècles. Ces créatures des plus banales accomplissent rarement quoi que ce soit de notable, et pourtant, même les civilisations les plus primitives laissent parfois leur empreinte dans l'histoire. »
languages.original_text: "A young and primitive civilisation, diligently exploring the region for the past several centuries. Rarely do they achieve anything of substance, and yet even such unremarkable creatures can at times leave a mark on history."

traits.locale_text: « Une jeune civilisation primitive, partie à la découverte de cette région au cours des derniers siècles. Ces créatures des plus banales accomplissent rarement quoi que ce soit de notable, et pourtant, même les civilisations les plus primitives laissent parfois leur empreinte dans l'histoire. »

languages.text: "Genç ve ilkel bir medeniyet, son birkaç yüzyıldır bölgeyi özenle keşfediyor. Nadiren dişe dokunur bir şey başarıyorlar ama yine de böylesine sıradan yaratıklar bile bazen tarihte iz bırakabiliyor."
languages.original_text: "A young and primitive civilisation, diligently exploring the region for the past several centuries. Rarely do they achieve anything of substance, and yet even such unremarkable creatures can at times leave a mark on history."

traits.locale_text: "Genç ve ilkel bir medeniyet, son birkaç yüzyıldır bölgeyi özenle keşfediyor. Nadiren dişe dokunur bir şey başarıyorlar ama yine de böylesine sıradan yaratıklar bile bazen tarihte iz bırakabiliyor."

languages.text: "Eine junge und primitive Zivilisation, die die Region seit mehreren Jahrhunderten eifrig erkundet. Sie erreichen nur selten etwas mit Substanz, aber auch unbedeutende Kreaturen wie sie hinterlassen in der Geschichte mitunter Spuren."
languages.original_text: "A young and primitive civilisation, diligently exploring the region for the past several centuries. Rarely do they achieve anything of substance, and yet even such unremarkable creatures can at times leave a mark on history."

traits.locale_text: "Eine junge und primitive Zivilisation, die die Region seit mehreren Jahrhunderten eifrig erkundet. Sie erreichen nur selten etwas mit Substanz, aber auch unbedeutende Kreaturen wie sie hinterlassen in der Geschichte mitunter Spuren."

languages.text: 「この地域を何世紀にも渡って探求してきた、若く原始的な文明。その成果はほとんどないが、それでも歴史に名を刻むこともある。」
languages.original_text: "A young and primitive civilisation, diligently exploring the region for the past several centuries. Rarely do they achieve anything of substance, and yet even such unremarkable creatures can at times leave a mark on history."

traits.locale_text: 「この地域を何世紀にも渡って探求してきた、若く原始的な文明。その成果はほとんどないが、それでも歴史に名を刻むこともある。」
